name: @forgeax/hello-cube
description: End-to-end Hello Cube ECS-driven binding exemplar (D-S10 + D-S1 four-path allow-list reused).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT for AC-12b (D-S10 / OQ-5 close): hello-cube smoke literal lives in apps/hello/cube/package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml only; not byte-for-byte aligned with hello-triangle (each app owns its own SSOT, K-12 stance preserved separately for AC-12a).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: triangle baseline anchor only, hello-cube ECS smoke covers GPU

bench.reason: ECS-driven binding exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; spike artefacts archived in feat-20260511-naga-rhi-wgpu-merge M5 (PR #34 + git history)
